/CAL:DEFENDANT'S BAIL HEARING/ORNAS/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,//DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANTSHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, DEFENDANT TO REMAIN WITHIN THE INTERIOR OF RESIDENCE AT GRACE HOUSE SOBER LIVING AT 3401 OAKLEY ROAD, ANTIOCH/X:DATE OF 08-27-20 IS CONFIRMED/
